title: Heat Water Phase
instructions: Heat purified water to 70-75°C in the main vessel. Add SLS and CAPB while stirring at 200 RPM.

title: Add Glycerin & Aloe
instructions: Reduce heat to 60°C. Add glycerin and aloe vera extract. Mix for 10 minutes at 150 RPM.

title: Cool Down & Add Fragrance
instructions: Cool batch to 40°C. Add lavender fragrance oil, preservative, and colorant. Mix gently at 100 RPM for 5 minutes.

title: Adjust pH & Thicken
instructions: Add citric acid to reach pH 5.0-5.5. Add sodium chloride slowly while mixing until desired viscosity.
